description: Tool life stop policy was fragmented across tools/tooling_life_limits/tooling_life_measurements.
acceptance_gate: Live LoadTool/StartJob handler reads physical policy and blocks below-stop tools.

description: Tool breakage suspect window lacked physical governed event/scope object.
repair_done: Added tool_breakage_suspect_window and quality containment plan generation.
acceptance_gate: Breakage command persists suspect window and opens canonical quality case/holds.

description: Gage calibration and MSA/GRR were linked conceptually but not one CTQ gate.
acceptance_gate: RecordCtqResult command fails closed on expired calibration, open OOT, or unacceptable MSA.

description: OOT impact lacked normalized shipped/WIP lot scope.
acceptance_gate: Inventory/WIP/shipment handlers consume OOT impact and hold affected lots/shipments.

description: Tool assembly compatibility was partially implicit in metadata.
repair_done: Added tooling_machine_compatibility_rule and machine-family compatibility gate.
acceptance_gate: LoadToolAssembly command reads physical compatibility rule by tool/assembly/equipment/operation.

description: P34 readiness did not yet consume advanced tooling/gage authority.
repair_done: Added optional ToolingGageAuthorityService injection to ResourceReadinessService.
acceptance_gate: Production command composition injects and persists P34/P35 combined readiness decisions.

description: PHPUnit cannot run because vendor/bin/phpunit is missing.
repair_done: Ran php lint and direct PHP smokes for mandatory scenarios.
acceptance_gate: Restore vendor dependencies and run PHPUnit in CI/VPS.
PostgreSQL configured/reachable with restore drill and zero P0/P1 blocker drift.
